response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the song 'dahlah.' by Kaela Kovalskia, performed here as a trio by hololive ID Gen 3 (Vestia Zeta, Kaela Kovalskia, and Kobo Kanaeru). The provided Reference JSON for 'Sabda Alam' is incorrect for this segment and has been ignored. Subtitles cover the full song and the subsequent introduction dialogue at Comic Frontier. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, ensuring no overlaps or early cutoffs.

subtitles.original: Saat dunia tak berjalan semestinya... oh oh
subtitles.english: When the world doesn't go as it should... oh oh

subtitles.original: Mungkin sudahlah saatnya kau coba lepaskan saja
subtitles.english: Maybe it's finally time for you to just let it go

subtitles.original: Tak perlu tanya mengapa lagi
subtitles.english: No need to ask why anymore

subtitles.original: Jika memang jawaban tak kau dapatkan
subtitles.english: If indeed you don't get the answer

subtitles.original: Jangan tangisi, coba lalui teka-tekinya
subtitles.english: Don't cry over it, try to get through the puzzle

subtitles.original: Relakanlah karena pada akhirnya
subtitles.english: Let it go, because in the end

subtitles.original: Kau lebih kuat daripada yang kau kira
subtitles.english: You are stronger than you think

subtitles.original: Mau gimana lagi?
subtitles.english: What else can we do?

subtitles.original: Halo Comic Frontier!
subtitles.english: Hello, Comic Frontier!

subtitles.original: Halo!
subtitles.english: Hello!

subtitles.original: Welcome to hololive Indonesia
subtitles.english: Welcome to hololive Indonesia

subtitles.original: 5th Anniversary LIVE
subtitles.english: 5th Anniversary LIVE

subtitles.original: Chromatic Future!
subtitles.english: Chromatic Future!

subtitles.original: Yeeay!
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: Wah gila gila gila!
subtitles.english: Wow, crazy crazy crazy!

subtitles.original: Makasih banyak semuanya udah pada datang ke konser 5 tahun kita ya!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much everyone for coming to our 5th year concert!

subtitles.original: Wah nggak berasa nggak sih udah 5 tahun aja?
subtitles.english: Wow, doesn't it feel like it's been 5 years already?

subtitles.original: Kalau gitu, kita mulai dari perkenalan diri dulu nggak sih?
subtitles.english: In that case, shall we start with introductions?

subtitles.original: Mulai dari aku! Aku! Aku!
subtitles.english: Starting from me! Me! Me!

subtitles.original: Ah ah mission start!
subtitles.english: Ah ah, mission start!

subtitles.original: Aku Vestia Zeta dari hololive Indonesia Gen 3. Nice to meet you!
subtitles.english: I'm Vestia Zeta from hololive Indonesia Gen 3. Nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: Kaela grinding every time, the blacksmith from hololive ID Gen 3. I'm Kaela Kovalskia, nice to meet you all!
subtitles.english: Kaela grinding every time, the blacksmith from hololive ID Gen 3. I'm Kaela Kovalskia, nice to meet you all!

subtitles.original: Bokobokoboko Kobo Kanaeru at your service.
subtitles.english: Bokobokoboko, Kobo Kanaeru at your service.

subtitles.original: Let me be your sun to shine your day.
subtitles.english: Let me be your sun to shine your day.

subtitles.original: Ehem! Kobokan mana suaranya?!
subtitles.english: Ehem! Kobokan, where's your voice?!

subtitles.original: Nah bertiga kami dari hololive Indonesia Gen 3, Holoh3ro!
subtitles.english: So, the three of us are from hololive Indonesia Gen 3, Holoh3ro!

subtitles.original: Wah nggak nyangka juga deh konser 5th Anniversary hololive ID ini akhirnya ada juga.
subtitles.english: Wow, I didn't expect this hololive ID 5th Anniversary concert to finally happen.

subtitles.original: Dari lagu pertama aja udah keren banget guys. Kerasa nggak?!
subtitles.english: Even from the first song it's been so cool guys. Can you feel it?!
